caption: A person with a white smartwatch on their left wrist is crafting on a light-colored cutting mat. The setting is a tabletop filled with scrapbooking supplies, including a tape runner, a red ink pad, a black ink pad, and various patterned papers with floral and brick motifs. A small tag in the upper left corner contains the text "is filled with ALL THE best things". The person's hands are actively manipulating several pieces of cardstock; they start by positioning a brick-patterned piece of paper over a floral background. As the sequence progresses, the person smooths down the paper and then lifts the brick-patterned layer, revealing the floral pattern underneath. A watermark reading "Stamping Life" is visible in the bottom left area of the workspace. The scene remains focused on the hands and the crafting materials throughout the process.
